query:
SELECT 
  sc.id,
  sc.confirmToken,
  sc.status,
  sc.supplierNotes,
  sc.confirmedAt,
  sc.expiresAt,
  sc.createdAt,
  s.name as supplierName,
  s.contactEmail
FROM supplier_confirmations sc
LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON sc.supplierId = s.id
ORDER BY sc.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
